testcase.name: Successful E2E purchase cycle from login to checkout - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given login page should be open in default browser..........................passed When click on email address field and add valid email "tapa@gmail.com"......passed And then click on password field and enter valid "admin@123"................passed And now click on login button "success".....................................passed Then login successfully and redirect to ninja home page.....................passed When ninja search input field receives "MacBook"............................passed Then ninja custom product list matches criteria.............................passed When user clicks on add to cart button for the item.........................passed Then product should be added to cart successfully...........................passed When user clicks on the black shopping cart button..........................passed And clicks on the checkout option...........................................passed Then user should be redirected to the checkout page.........................passed

testcase.classname: verify ninja add to cart functionality
testcase.name: verify add to cart button - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given login page should be open in default browser..........................passed When click on email address field and add valid email "tapa@gmail.com"......passed And then click on password field and enter valid "admin@123"................passed And now click on login button "success".....................................passed Then login successfully and redirect to ninja home page.....................passed And ninja search input field receives "iphone"..............................passed Then ninja custom product list matches criteria.............................passed When user clicks on add to cart button for the item.........................passed Then product should be added to cart successfully...........................passed

testcase.name: verify cart button - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given login page should be open in default browser..........................passed When click on email address field and add valid email "tapa@gmail.com"......passed And then click on password field and enter valid "admin@123"................passed And now click on login button "success".....................................passed Then login successfully and redirect to ninja home page.....................passed And ninja search input field receives "iphone"..............................passed Then ninja custom product list matches criteria.............................passed When user clicks on add to cart button for the item.........................passed Then product should be added to cart successfully...........................passed When user clicks on the black shopping cart button..........................passed And clicks on the checkout option...........................................passed Then user should be redirected to the checkout page.........................passed

testcase.name: Verify login page - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given login page should be open in default browser..........................passed When click on email address field and add valid email "tapa@gmail.com"......passed And then click on password field and enter valid "admin@123"................passed And now click on login button "success".....................................passed Then login successfully and redirect to ninja home page.....................passed

testcase.name: Verify login page - Example #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given login page should be open in default browser..........................passed When click on email address field and add valid email "iausih"..............passed And then click on password field and enter valid "password".................passed And now click on login button "fail"........................................passed Then login successfully and redirect to ninja home page.....................passed

testcase.name: Verify login page - Example #1.3
testcase.system-out: Given login page should be open in default browser..........................passed When click on email address field and add valid email "username"............passed And then click on password field and enter valid "asdad"....................passed And now click on login button "fail"........................................passed Then login successfully and redirect to ninja home page.....................passed

testcase.name: verify search buttons - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given login page should be open in default browser..........................passed When click on email address field and add valid email "tapa@gmail.com"......passed And then click on password field and enter valid "admin@123"................passed And now click on login button "success".....................................passed Then login successfully and redirect to ninja home page.....................passed And ninja search input field receives "iphone"..............................passed Then ninja custom product list matches criteria.............................passed

testcase.name: verify search buttons - Example #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given login page should be open in default browser..........................passed When click on email address field and add valid email "tapa@gmail.com"......passed And then click on password field and enter valid "admin@123"................passed And now click on login button "success".....................................passed Then login successfully and redirect to ninja home page.....................passed And ninja search input field receives "pay".................................passed Then ninja custom product list matches criteria.............................passed
